data.title: Geron Corporation Reports Inducement Grant Under Nasdaq Listing Rule 5635(c)(4)
data.description: In Foster City, California, on April 14, 2026, Geron Corporation announced that they have awarded a stock option to Timothy Williams, the new Executive Vice President, Chief Legal Officer, and Corporate Secretary. The option allows Williams to purchase 2,500,000 shares of Geron common stock. This equity award was given to entice Williams to accept the position with the commercial stage biopharmaceutical company.

data.title: Has Bitcoin Bottomed? No, But It Could In May, Analyst Says
data.description: A crypto analyst, Benjamin Cowen, suggests that Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) could potentially reach a market bottom in May, but this would require a significant sharp drop in prices. The more likely scenario, based on historical market cycles, points to a bottom around October 2026. Cowen stated in a podcast on Apr. 15 that while a May bottom is feasible, it is considered a less probable outcome unless there is a notable deviation from past trends. He highlighted similarities between the current cycle and previous midterm-year patterns, indicating a sideways market movement before a more decisive phase. More details can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: MDU Resources to Webcast First Quarter 2026 Earnings Conference Call
data.description: BISMARCK, North Dakota - On April 16, 2026, it was announced that MDU Resources Group, Inc. (NYSE: MDU) is set to hold a webcast of its first quarter 2026 earnings conference call at 2 p.m. Eastern Time on May 7. The company will unveil its first quarter results prior to the opening of U.S. financial markets on that same day. For those interested, the webcast will be accessible...

data.title: NiSource Announces Strategic Energy Infrastructure Agreements to Enhance Customer Value and Economic Growth in Indiana
data.description: NiSource Inc. (NYSE: NI) has revealed a fresh long-term energy deal with an Alphabet Inc. subsidiary. This deal is set to aid in the establishment and management of a sizeable data center in northern Indiana, bringing advantages to current customers and nearby communities. The agreement, the second to utilize NiSource’s groundbreaking solution, NIPSCO Generation LLC (GenCo), seeks to offer value to the existing system.

data.description: In Orville, Ohio, on April 16, 2026, The J.M. Smucker Co. (NYSE: SJM) disclosed that its Board of Directors has sanctioned a regular dividend of $1.10 per share for the Company's common shares, to be paid from the Company's capital surplus. This dividend is scheduled to be distributed on Monday, June ...

data.title: TriNet to Report First Quarter 2026 Financial Results on April 30
data.description: In Dublin, California on April 16, 2026, TriNet, known as a top provider of HR solutions for small and medium-sized businesses, disclosed plans to unveil financial outcomes for the first quarter concluding on March 31, 2026, prior to the commencement of the U.S. market trading session. TriNet is listed on the NYSE under the ticker symbol TNET.

data.title: Simmons First National Corporation Reports First Quarter EPS of $0.47
data.description: In Pine Bluff, Arkansas, as of April 16, 2026, financial data for the first quarter of 2026 and comparisons with the fourth quarter of 2025 and first quarter of 2025 were released. Key income statement figures (in millions) for 1Q26 versus 4Q25 include: a net income of $68.5 million and diluted earnings per share (EPS) of $0.47. Additionally, adjusted net income was reported at $68.6 million.

data.title: Rise Health Rebrands as Primor Health, Signaling Next Phase of Growth as a Multi-State Primary Care Platform
data.description: On April 16, 2026, Rise Health, a primary care platform supported by Lorient Capital and Martis Capital, revealed a rebranding initiative showcasing its platform's advancement, unified operating model, and dedication to clinical excellence in Nevada, New Mexico, and Texas. This move signifies the company's evolution and commitment to delivering exceptional healthcare services.
US Treasury Secretary Bessent in a meeting with Japan's Fin. Min reaffirmed the strong alliance between our countries.

data.title: dLocal Updates Time of First Quarter 2026 Earnings Call; Date Remains May 14, 2026
data.description: In Montevideo, Uruguay, on April 16, 2026, DLocal Limited (NASDAQ: DLO) shared that they are the primary cross-border payment platform linking global vendors with growing markets. They publicized a shift in the timing of their upcoming earnings conference call.
US: US Treasury Secretary Bessent met with European Commissioner Dombrovskis.

data.title: US government increasingly relies on AI, but challenges emerge due to public doubts. AI use surges but faces obstacles.
data.description: In recent times, the US government has quickly implemented AI technology, with a noticeable rise in skepticism towards both the technology itself and government agencies.

data.title: Despite cease-fire, Iran's hackers remain active, seeking advantage in the conflict through continuing cyberspace operations.
data.description: The cyber operatives in Tehran are actively working to gain an edge in the ongoing conflict through a new phase of digital operations.

data.title: Pentagon asks Ford and G.M for aid to lower costs and speed up weapons production, engaging in talks for manufacturing parts.
data.description: Pentagon officials are in discussions with General Motors and Ford Motor due to concerns about the slow pace and high cost of weapons production. The talks revolve around the possibility of having certain parts manufactured by the two companies to address these issues.
US Treasury Secretary Bessent: Discussed critical minerals with Italy's Economy Minister Giorgetti

data.title: Alcoa Stock Drops After Q1 Results Fall Short: Details
data.description: Alcoa Corp. (NYSE: AA) released its first-quarter earnings report after Thursday's market close, falling short of analyst expectations on both revenue and profit margins. The company's quarterly earnings were reported at $1.40 per share, below the anticipated $1.49 per share as per Benzinga Pro data. Alcoa attributed the results to increased profitability driven by higher aluminum prices. However, quarterly revenue stood at $3.19 billion, failing to meet the estimated $3.3 billion. For more details, the full article can be found on Benzinga.com. Check out the latest movement of AA stock prices.

data.title: Adams Natural Resources Fund Announces First Quarter 2026 Performance
data.description: Adams Natural Resources Fund, Inc. disclosed its investment performance for the first quarter of 2026 in Baltimore. The Fund reported a total return of 32.3% on its net asset value during this period, factoring in reinvested dividends and capital gains. In comparison, the S&P 500 Energy Sector saw a return of 38.3%, while the S&P 500 Materials Sector yielded 9.7%. The Fund's benchmark, composed of 80% S&P 500 Energy Sector and 20% S&P 500 Materials Sector, delivered a return of 32.6%. Additionally, the total return on the Fund's market price for the same timeframe stood at 30.3%.

data.title: Adams Diversified Equity Fund Announces First Quarter 2026 Performance
data.description: Adams Diversified Equity Fund, Inc. (NYSE: ADX) revealed its investment performance for Q1 2026, reporting a -4.8% total return on net asset value with reinvested dividends and capital gains. In comparison, the S&P 500 Index and Morningstar U.S. Large Blend category had -4.3% and -4.4% total returns, respectively, during the same period. Additionally, the Fund's market price saw a -4.2% total return.

data.title: Cohen & Steers Reports Results for First Quarter 2026
data.description: On April 16, 2026, Cohen & Steers, Inc. (NYSE: CNS) announced its financial results for the quarter ending on March 31, 2026. The company's earnings report for the first quarter of 2026 can be accessed on their website.
US: US Treasury Secretary Bessent met with UK's Chancellor Reeves yesterday.
